280 ChatGPT business prompts to $10k/mo

280 ChatGPT business prompts to $10k/mo

Chris Notion
Life OS Dashboard

Life OS Dashboard

K. Victoria Chase

#### What's great

Notion is great, but it can be a convoluted process, and this dashboard didn't help to simply "life."

#### What needs improvement [...] #### vs Alternatives

I thought I was purchasing the Life OS dashboard I saw recommended by another author, but that ended up being a fully customizable and personalized HTML site built with Claude. It was easier for me to build my own dashboard (that incorporated my writing business) with Claude than it was to figure out why a habit had to be tied to the journal element in this template (by the way, I don't like to journal on a computer and can't get rid of this feature if you want a refund). This template is fairly inflexible in the way it's built.

Tom Chandler
Chris Notion
